beats.text: Tabular reinforcement learning stores one value per state, which becomes useless the moment the state space grows large.

visual.sub: When the lookup table runs out

beats.text: A single Atari frame has more configurations than there are atoms in the universe, so a table can never revisit a state.
The fix is to replace the table with a neural network that generalizes across states, which is what makes the method deep.
Sutton and Barto named the failure mode the deadly triad: three ingredients that together risk divergence.
Bootstrapping means the regression target depends on the network's own output, so the network chases a target it keeps moving.

visual.note: target computed from the same network being updated

beats.text: Removing any one ingredient restores safety, so every algorithm in this chapter is a recipe for keeping the three forces balanced.
The 2015 Deep Q-Network reached human-level play on most of forty-nine Atari games, learning straight from raw pixels.
Experience replay writes every transition into a large buffer and trains on random minibatches drawn from it.

visual.label: transitions held in a replay buffer

beats.text: Random sampling breaks the correlation between consecutive frames and reuses each experience for many gradient updates.
The target network is a frozen copy used to compute the regression target, so it does not move while the online network chases it.

visual.note: gradient never flows through the frozen target

beats.text: Modern code refreshes the target with a slow Polyak average, nudging it a tiny step toward the online weights each update.

visual.note: with tau = 0.005 the target trails slowly

beats.text: With both stabilizers on the learned value climbs smoothly to the truth; remove them and it overshoots and oscillates.
Vanilla policy gradients are unbiased but brittle, since a single overlarge step can collapse the policy beyond recovery.
PPO descends from TRPO, whose principle is to improve the policy without stepping far from the one that gathered the data.

visual.note: the probability ratio; r = 1 means no change

beats.text: The clipped surrogate objective takes the pessimistic minimum of the clipped and unclipped terms, forming a lower bound.
The default epsilon of 0.2 confines the ratio to the interval from 0.8 to 1.2, the trust region made of arithmetic.
Once an update would move the policy too far in the rewarding direction the gradient switches off, so it cannot over-commit.
For a ratio of 1.5 with advantage plus two the objective caps at 2.4, since pushing the ratio higher buys nothing.
DQN's max over actions is intractable when the action is a vector of continuous torques, so continuous control needs another shape.
Actor-critic methods keep a learned policy and a learned value, letting the two improve each other.
DDPG reads as DQN for continuous actions, replacing the inner max with a deterministic actor, but is sensitive to hyperparameters.

visual.note: deterministic actor removes the inner maximization

beats.text: TD3 adds three fixes: twin critics taking the minimum, delayed actor updates, and noise smoothing on the target action.
Soft Actor-Critic, the current default, adds a per-step entropy bonus that pays the agent to stay random while doing well.

visual.note: the temperature alpha sets the price of randomness

beats.text: Entropy turns exploration into a first-class term of the objective, and modern SAC tunes alpha automatically to a target.

visual.label: alpha at which SAC recovers ordinary reward maximization

beats.text: Deep RL works, yet it is the least reproducible corner of mainstream machine learning because the agent generates its own data.
Seed sensitivity means the same code and hyperparameters, changing only the random seed, can produce wildly different curves.
Henderson and colleagues showed in 2018 that reported results were routinely driven by a handful of lucky seeds.
The mean across seeds and its standard error capture what one run cannot, but the standard error shrinks only as one over root N.

visual.note: halving uncertainty costs four times the compute

beats.text: Five to ten independent seeds with the spread shown is the minimum honest unit of evidence in deep RL.
Pin the environment, library, hardware, and every hyperparameter, since details like reward scaling can swing the result.
